name: Overnight Porridge
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all of the ingredients in a medium-sized bowl.
2. Stir well to combine.
3. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
4. Transfer the mixture to a saucepan or microwaveable dish.
5. Stove method: Cook over medium heat for 6 to 8 minutes, stirring frequently.
6. Microwave method: Cover with clear plastic wrap, vented at one corner. Microwave at 100 percent power for 5 to 7 minutes, stirring twice while heating.
